title: taraxacum jailae
intro: Taraxacum jailae, also known as the Mongolian dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Taraxacum jailae include its potential to help lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve liver function. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum jailae are typically made from the leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as a tea, infused in oil, or used in capsule form.
